items.name_en: Exclusive Background Dynamic Chip Top-tier Original M13105 This CarryAll Dark Medium bag is crafted from soft lambskin to create a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2025 Kazuki Takamatsu 33 Colors Spring/Summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware contrasts with the good tactile micro-crepe texture. Ample space accommodates various daily items, making it a perfect travel companion.

items.name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive】Dynamic Chip M25453 Apricot, M47209 Black, M25452 White. This Summer Bundle handbag is from the Dégradé series, featuring a fresh drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents a gradient tone, brightening any seasonal look. Dual handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various stylish carrying ways, making it a perfect companion for day and night.

CHANEL Overseas Channel Exclusive❗️ Calfskin Bucket Bag, CHANEL SS23 Bucket Bag. In addition to being more compact than the 22 model, the "gemstones" and logo pendants on the chain offer more refined details compared to the modern urban aesthetic, especially perfect for vacation and matching with solid colors or tonal looks.

items.name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive】Dynamic Chip M11839 Cashmere Tote. This Bella handbag is from the LV Ski series, incorporating wool trim on exquisite perforated velvet leather to showcase a cozy texture for the season. The Monogram perforated pattern continues the iconic element, while chain accents add a finishing touch. The circular coin pocket ensures secure storage.

items.name_en: 【Overseas Exclusive】M12099 Black, Small. 🔥 Double-sided. This legendary Neverfull BB handbag always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city tote. Loosen the drawstrings to revert to a chic and practical handbag. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. The version shown is made of Damier Azur canvas.

items.name_en: 【Haiyuan Exclusive】M11393 Black, Apricot, White. This Babylone Tote handbag traces its roots to the Babylone trend community in Paris, using fine calfskin to outline clean lines and ample space for your travel essentials. It features a central zip pocket and adjustable handles for different shoulder lengths. 31 x 21.5 x 13 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: (Dynamic Chip Version) Original Enhanced Version
items.name_cn:
(Dynamic Chip Version) Original Enhanced Version
🔝CANOÉ Tote
Model: M83480
Crafted from Monogram canvas, this bag combines the drawstring of the Noé bag with the molded bottom of the Cannes bag, offering both trendy style and practical function. The woven chain and leather shoulder strap are detachable for multiple carrying ways.
Size: 14*20.5*14

items.name_en: Top Quality Original【Exclusive Photo M12664 Green 】This card case features a slim silhouette constructed from Monogram Heritage canvas, easily fitting into pockets or handbags. The flap is secured by a hidden snap button, revealing a fan-fold compartment and card slots. Calfskin lining and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo inspired by Damier canvas add refined details. 8 x 1 x 10.5 cm (H x W x L)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12172 Blue] As one of Louis Vuitton's classic designs, the Sarah wallet blends Monogram canvas with grained leather lining, recreating the elegance of the envelope style.
